bird.name: 大鵰鴞
bird.summary: 大角鴞（學名：Bubo virginianus）是美洲一種中型的貓頭鷹。牠們的適應力強，是美洲分佈得最廣的鴟鴞科。 南美洲南部的小鵰鴞經常被認為是大角鴞的亞種。

locations.name: 美洲
locations.summary: 亚美利加洲（英語：Americas）簡稱美洲，位于西半球，自然地理分为北美洲和南美洲，其中北美洲可进一步划分为北美地区、中美洲（联合国地理方案将墨西哥视为中美洲的一部分）和加勒比地区（西印度群岛）三个地理区域。美洲的总面積達4254.9万…

relations.subject: 大鵰鴞
relations.evidence: |year=1966 |title=The World of the Great Horned Owl |publisher=Lippingcott Company |location=Philadelphia |asin=B0006BN8QG}} is a large owl native to the Americas

relations.subject: 大鵰鴞
relations.evidence: |last2=Yahner |year=1994 |title=Habitat characteristics of Great Horned Owls in southcentral Pennsylvania |journal=Journal of Raptor Research |issue=28 |pages=164–170 |url=https://archive.org/details/biostor-215685}} In prairies, grasslands and deserts, they can successfully live year-round as long as there are rocky canyons, steep gullies and/or wooded coulees with shade-giving trees to provide shelter and nesting sites.{{cite journal |last1=Smith |first1=D
relations.object_summary: 大型猛禽和食腐鸟偏好的高崖栖息环境。

relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

relations.subject: 大鵰鴞
relations.evidence: |last2=Krabbe |year=1990 |title=Birds of the high Andes |publisher=Zoological Museum, University of Copenhagen, and Apollo Books |location=Svendborg, Denmark |isbn=87-88757-16-1}} They are generally rare in non-tidal wetland habitat{{cite journal |last1=Accordi |first1=I
